generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST110LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-110LX 2‑D LiDAR mounted on the 1/10‑scale autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelDepthSenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel DepthSense D435i depth camera providing RGB‑D frames"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board state sensor that measures vehicle longitudinal speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board state sensor that measures steering wheel angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST110LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthSenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data instances
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3‑D point‑cloud generated by the Hokuyo LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image (RGB‑D) produced by the Intel camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current vehicle speed in meters per second"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current steering angle in degrees"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

// C10: Model instances
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN point‑cloud clustering algorithm used for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter based multi‑object tracker applied to clustered points"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrackingEnabler
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC model (ISO 15622) that computes a desired following speed from lead‑vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS‑2 node that runs the DBSCAN clustering algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance TrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS‑2 node that executes the Kalman‑filter tracker"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS‑2 node that runs the ACC algorithm and returns a desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS‑2 interface that forwards operator commands to the Actuation Functional Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Backend service that creates time‑series reports and stores them in the SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance UIVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Qt/ROS‑2 based UI that visualises vehicle state, projected path and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time UI visualisation of vehicle state, projected path and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ProjectedPathInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes the ACC algorithm in the Digital Twin and returns the computed desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides SetDesiredSpeedAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, adjust speed and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides IssueRemoteManagementCommandAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides DisableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates and stores time‑series reports of vehicle operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time vehicle speed and steering angle displayed in the UI"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected vehicle trajectory visualised based on current motion state"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracked objects (clusters) shown with IDs and trajectories"
]

instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Desired following speed computed by the ACC model"
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Summary report containing time‑series of speed, steering, and ACC decisions"
]

// C17: Actions
instance IssueRemoteManagementCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator‑issued command to the vehicle (e.g., start, stop, mode change)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command sent to set the vehicle's desired speed as computed by ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable the Adaptive Cruise Control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable the Adaptive Cruise Control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate brake command triggered by the operator or safety system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity issues control commands—including desired speed for ACC, enable/disable ACC, and emergency‑brake commands—through the Actuation FE over the same Wi‑Fi/ROS 2 link, which are applied to the motor and steering servo of the physical twin."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in real time with a maximum end‑to‑end latency of 100 ms between vehicle and DT (requirement R7) and requires clock synchronization across components within 100 ms accuracy (requirement R8)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation orchestrates the Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators, point‑cloud processing), the Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC, reporting, visualization preprocessing), the User Entity (3D visualization UI and control panel), and a Cross‑System Entity (Data Translation FE) communicating via ROS 2 topics over Wi‑Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during the operation stage for monitoring, control, and remote management, and also during development/testing to troubleshoot ACC behavior, reflecting both operational and developmental life‑cycle phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity LiDAR and depth‑camera data are used for perception; the ACC algorithm complies with ISO 15622; latency and clock‑sync constraints (≤100 ms) ensure timely and coherent interaction, supporting safety‑critical operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT uses a Wi‑Fi network running ROS 2; data are serialized and transformed by the Data Translation Functional Entity; the standardized communication interface mandated by requirement R1 ensures modular, loosely‑coupled components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity and User Entity are hosted on external compute hardware (e.g., a workstation or cloud server) distinct from the vehicle’s onboard Jetson; each functional entity runs as a ROS 2 package on its respective host."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows the ISO 23247 reference architecture, adopts the ISO 15622 specification for ACC, utilizes the ISO/IEC 30173 conceptual framework, and implements the standardized communication interface required by R1; ROS 2 provides a de‑facto standard for middleware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety is addressed by enforcing a ≤100 ms latency, 100 ms clock sync, and by implementing ACC per ISO 15622; emergency‑brake commands can be issued remotely. No explicit security mechanisms (e.g., authentication, encryption) are described in the document."
]
